title: Derivation registry row — one TSV row in derivation_registry.tsv
description: Flat catalogue row, one per registered derivation. Generated from derivation_v1 JSONs by lib/registry_index.py. The full definition (including parent_set_ids[] for multi-parent ops) lives in the JSON; definition_path points there when the row alone isn't sufficient.

parent_set_id.description: Primary parent. For multi-parent ops, definition_path points at the JSON.

operation_params_id.description: FK into operation_params. Empty when the op has no params.

produces_set_id.description: Primary child set_id. May be empty until the child set is registered.

output_hash.description: sha256:<hex> of canonical produced-set members. Empty if not yet computed.

definition_path.description: Path to the derivation_v1 JSON when multi-parent or nested fields exceed TSV columns.
